title: cleome lanceolata subsp. lanceolata
intro: Cleome lanceolata subsp. lanceolata, also known as the Mexican bee plant or yellow bee plant, is a perennial plant species native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant contains saponins, which are known for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Cleome lanceolata subsp. lanceolata include its potential to treat various ailments, such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
